title: Bitter Flaky Portuguese Pinto Beans Crumble
description: This hangover-cure dish features bitter pinto beans that are smoked and served in a flaky crumbly consistency, ideal as an early morning snack or breakfast.
instructions: Soak the pinto beans in water overnight to soften them.
Drain and rinse the soaked pinto beans. Add them to a pot with 4 cups of fresh water, salt, and smoked paprika. Bring to a boil and reduce heat. Simmer for about 30 minutes or until tender.
Peel and chop the raw onion into small pieces. Finely mince the garlic clove.
Preheat your oven to 200°C (400°F). Lightly grease a baking dish with oil.
Add the chopped onions and minced garlic to the cooked pinto beans in the pot, mix well, and let it sit for about 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Once satiated, spoon the mixture into the greased baking dish. Bake for approximately 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
